Instruction: Walk straight forward across the paved plaza, keeping the large, curved glass building on your right. Follow the paved path with dark gray stripes. Continue straight, passing a tall, thin light pole on your right. As you pass the light pole, look to the grassy area on your right to find a group of white statues depicting people standing in a circle. Leave the paved path and walk over to the statues. Stop in front of the white statues. You have arrived at your destination.
